## What is the win

One sentence. What result does this produce?

## Why it matters

Tie it to the outcome: revenue, time saved, calls not missed, an agent hired.

## Steps

- [ ] Step one
- [ ] Step two
- [ ] Step three

## Done when

What has to be true for this to be closed.

## Milestone and labels

- Milestone: which day of the plan (Day 1 to Day 7).
- Labels: pick from `agent`, `ops`, `revenue`, `content`, `quick-win`.
